narrative_claim: Clean energy push is driving up bills
actual_data: Clean energy is 1.8% of price increase since 2015

narrative_claim: Clean energy compliance is the primary cost
actual_data: Clean energy is 4.7% of rate increase filings; infrastructure is #1

narrative_claim: Clean energy mandates caused price spike
actual_data: NY prices grew 41.6% vs 35.2% CPI; SBC explains only 1.8% of the increase
Utilities paid $39,200M in dividends (2015-2024) while requesting billions in increases

narrative_claim: Utility costs are increasing for everyone
actual_data: CEO comp grew 64.2% (2015-2024) vs 41.6% rate increase
